objective: Rewrite STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds to be session-agnostic, add fallup ladder, enforce dual-family Tier 1 planning authority, prohibit same-family QA, and add functional-acceptance-auditor as required final gate.
scope_boundary: Implementation child slice under Epic #650 (Governance Policy Refresh).
Owns STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds and §PDCAR sections only.
Must add: session-agnostic routing prose, fallup ladder, dual-family Tier 1, same-family QA prohibition, functional-acceptance-auditor Tier 4 gate.
Cross-family QA required: openai-family reviewer must sign cross-review artifact before closeout.
out_of_scope: Slice G (hldpro-sim personas) — owned by issue #652.
Slice H (CI hardening) — owned by issue #653, blocked until this slice merges.
Any changes to packages/ or agents/.
research_summary: Epic #650 plan (gpt-5.4 ACCEPTED on 2026-05-01) authorizes STANDARDS.md SoM rewrite. Key requirements: session-agnostic routing, fallup direction explicit, Tier 1 dual-family, cross-family QA prohibition, functional-acceptance-auditor as mandatory Tier 4 final gate. Execution scope at raw/execution-scopes/2026-05-01-issue-651-slice-f-standards-rewrite.json.

material_deviation_rules: HARD STOP if any write touches .github/workflows/, .claude/hooks/, hooks/, scripts/, packages/, agents/, docs/schemas/.
HARD STOP if same-family QA is used (worker=anthropic, QA must be openai).
If functional-acceptance-auditor is not available post-merge, document in FAIL_FAST_LOG.md and open follow-up issue.
